summary: Cursor shows the strongest task-bounded wins here, but most causal explanations remain suggestive and the overall ranking is methodologically limited.

bounded_claims.claim_text: Cursor was the strongest performer in the blank-repo app-generation task.
bounded_claims.bounds: The result is well supported for this specific vibe-coding task, but the evidence does not establish the internal cause of Cursor’s stronger output and does not justify extending the result to all coding-agent settings.

bounded_claims.claim_text: Gemini CLI’s very large context window did not translate into top performance in the blank-repo task, even though it later completed the backend refactor after loading broad codebase context.
bounded_claims.bounds: The evidence supports only a narrow conclusion: large context capacity did not by itself ensure strong blank-repo execution, while broad context loading may still help on repository-oriented work; the article does not isolate why performance differed across task types.
